---
name: Porftfolio
description: "Use when creating or updating React components, CSS modules, responsive layouts, and section-based portfolio UI."
---

# React Component Dev

## Use When

- Creating new React components
- Updating section layouts
- Fixing responsive issues
- Styling portfolio sections

## Rules

- Follow the existing section pattern used in this repo
- Keep one component per file
- Use co-located CSS
- Preserve the current visual style
- Prefer minimal edits

## Workflow

1. Read the existing component and CSS first
2. Reuse existing class naming patterns
3. Keep mobile responsiveness intact
4. Run a build after edits
